name: koraidon
flavor_texts: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.
text: Koraidon is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a fighting and dragon-type Pokémon. Abilities: orichalcum-pulse. Base stats — HP: 100, Attack: 135, Defense: 115, Sp. Atk: 85, Sp. Def: 100, Speed: 135. Evolution line: koraidon. Lore: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists. This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.
